messages.content: 中译英：在我教授的每一堂课上，她都认真记录笔记、积极思考、主动探索，课下跟我和同学踊跃探讨财政税务专业理论知识，并认真完成每一次课后作业。她认真研读教材和课件，取得了92分的期末成绩，从一个不熟悉学术写作的初学者逐步成长为会思考、会提问、会总结、会应用的优秀毕业生。

In every class taught by my professor, she diligently takes notes, actively thinks, and actively explores. After class, she actively discusses theoretical knowledge of fiscal and taxation majors with me and my classmates, and completes every homework assignment seriously. She carefully studies the textbooks and course materials, and achieved a final score of 92. She has gradually transformed from a beginner unfamiliar with academic writing into an excellent graduate student who can think, ask questions, summarize, and apply knowledge.

润色如下内容：In every class taught by my professor, she diligently takes notes, actively thinks, and actively explores. After class, she actively discusses theoretical knowledge of fiscal and taxation majors with me and my classmates, and completes every homework assignment seriously. She carefully studies the textbooks and course materials, and achieved a final score of 92. She has gradually transformed from a beginner unfamiliar with academic writing into an excellent graduate student who can think, ask questions, summarize, and apply knowledge.

In every class taught by my professor, she diligently takes notes, actively engages in critical thinking, and eagerly explores new ideas. After class, she actively engages in discussions with me and my classmates about theoretical knowledge in the field of fiscal and taxation. Additionally, she consistently demonstrates her commitment by completing every homework assignment with great dedication. Through her meticulous study of textbooks and course materials, she managed to achieve an impressive final score of 92. Throughout her academic journey, she has undergone a transformative process, evolving from a novice with little familiarity with academic writing into an exceptional graduate student who possesses the abilities to think critically, ask insightful questions, summarize effectively, and apply knowledge proficiently.
中译英：她大学四年在校期间学习认真刻苦，曾以年级综合评分前10%的成绩获校级一等奖学金。

During her four years in college, she studied diligently and worked hard. She achieved outstanding results, ranking in the top 10% of her class and receiving a first-class scholarship from the university.

润色如下内容：During her four years in college, she studied diligently and worked hard. She achieved outstanding results, ranking in the top 10% of her class and receiving a first-class scholarship from the university.

Throughout her four years in college, she exhibited unwavering dedication and perseverance in her studies. Her commitment to excellence was evident as she consistently achieved exceptional results, ranking within the top 10% of her class. In recognition of her outstanding academic performance, she was awarded a prestigious first-class scholarship by the university.

中译英：她在东北财经大学就读期间全面学习宏微观经济学基础理论，掌握了计量经济学、统计学等专业知识，广泛涉猎会计学、金融学、中外财政制度、市场营销等应用学科。同时，她能够熟练运用财政管理的具体方法；熟练掌握本专业所必需的经济分析、计算机应用等实际操作技能，具备调查研究、分析解决本专业实际问题和进一步深入研究的能力。在我看来，她理论基础扎实、实践能力强、综合素质高，具有创新精神，能够胜任完成贵校的研究生课程。

During her studies at Northeast University of Finance and Economics, she underwent a comprehensive learning experience in both macro and microeconomic fundamental theories. She mastered specialized knowledge in econometrics, statistics, and delved into various applied disciplines such as accounting, finance, domestic and international fiscal systems, and marketing. Additionally, she demonstrated a high level of proficiency in the practical application of financial management techniques and possessed solid skills in economic analysis and computer applications, which are essential for her field. She also showcased her abilities in conducting research, analyzing and solving problems within her field, and displayed potential for further in-depth research. From my perspective, she possesses a strong theoretical foundation, excellent practical skills, and outstanding overall qualities. With her innovative mindset, she is more than capable of successfully completing graduate courses at your esteemed institution.

润色如下内容：During her studies at Northeast University of Finance and Economics, she underwent a comprehensive learning experience in both macro and microeconomic fundamental theories. She mastered specialized knowledge in econometrics, statistics, and delved into various applied disciplines such as accounting, finance, domestic and international fiscal systems, and marketing. Additionally, she demonstrated a high level of proficiency in the practical application of financial management techniques and possessed solid skills in economic analysis and computer applications, which are essential for her field. She also showcased her abilities in conducting research, analyzing and solving problems within her field, and displayed potential for further in-depth research. From my perspective, she possesses a strong theoretical foundation, excellent practical skills, and outstanding overall qualities. With her innovative mindset, she is more than capable of successfully completing graduate courses at your esteemed institution.

During her studies at Northeast University of Finance and Economics, she received a comprehensive education in both macro and microeconomic theories. She acquired a deep understanding of key subjects like econometrics and statistics, while also exploring a broad range of applied disciplines, including accounting, finance, domestic and international fiscal systems, and marketing. Moreover, she demonstrated exceptional proficiency in the practical application of financial management techniques and displayed solid skills in economic analysis and computer applications, which are indispensable in her field. She also showcased her ability to conduct research, analyze and solve problems within her area of expertise, and displayed potential for further in-depth research. From my perspective, she possesses a solid theoretical foundation, excellent practical skills, and outstanding overall qualities. With her innovative mindset, she is more than capable of successfully completing graduate courses at your esteemed institution.
润色如下内容：The consideration of perfecting our local government bond issuance market
The consideration of perfecting our local government bond issuance market.

润色如下内容：This letter serves as a postgraduate study recommendation for Miss Qiqie YANG. In the capacity of her teacher for the Public Debt course as well as a supervisor for her graduation thesis titled The Thought on Perfecting Our Local Government Bond Issuance Market, I thus have a good chance to observe her performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of her potential.

This letter serves as a strong recommendation for Miss Qiqie YANG's postgraduate studies. As her teacher for the Public Debt course and the supervisor for her graduation thesis titled "Thoughts on Perfecting Our Local Government Bond Issuance Market," I have had the opportunity to closely observe her performance and am well-equipped to assess her potential.
中译英：她曾获“志愿实践优秀个人”和“优秀共青团员”荣誉，校内通过计算机二级、证券从业资格考试、大学英语四六级考试，以加权均分84.81的成绩顺利毕业。

She has been honored with the titles of "Outstanding Individual in Volunteer Practice" and "Excellent Communist Youth League Member". Within the university, she successfully passed the Level 2 Computer Examination, Securities Practitioner Qualification Examination, and the College English Test Band 4 and 6, achieving a weighted average score of 84.81, and graduated smoothly.

润色如下内容：She has been honored with the titles of “Outstanding Individual in Volunteer Practice” and “Excellent Communist Youth League Member”. Within the university, she successfully passed the Level 2 Computer Examination, Securities Practitioner Qualification Examination, and the College English Test Band 4 and 6, achieving a weighted average score of 84.81, and graduated smoothly.

She has been honored with the titles of "Outstanding Individual in Volunteer Practice" and "Excellent Communist Youth League Member" for her exceptional contributions and dedication. Throughout her university years, she achieved outstanding results, passing the Level 2 Computer Examination, Securities Practitioner Qualification Examination, and the College English Test Band 4 and 6 with flying colors. Her commitment to excellence is evident in her impressive weighted average score of 84.81. She successfully completed all the requirements and graduated smoothly from the university.
